summary: WooCommerce My Account page for affiliate and rewards login/dashboard, with a prompt to contact the Cavallo team for help.
Shop landing page for Cavallo hoof boots linking to a boot-selection guide and a hoof-measuring guide to help buyers choose and fit the right boots.
Review submission page inviting customers to share their Cavallo hoof-boot experience for use in articles, the website, and social media.
Customer testimonial from Deby O'Gorman about riding the rocky 33-mile Echo Lakes to Barker Pass segment of the Tahoe Rim Trail in two-year-old Cavallo boots that outperformed friends' Easyboots.
Customer testimonial from Annie Logan about using Cavallo Simple Boots on her barefoot Australian Brumby Toby across alpine swamps, bogs, and rocky terrain.
Customer testimonial from Lois about four years of using Cavallo Simple Boots on three barefoot horses across rivers, ice, snow, and rocky Teton mountain trails.
Customer testimonial from Margi Weir about Cavallo Simple Boots fitting her Australian Stockhorse stallion's irregular hooves and correcting his uneven movement.
Short customer testimonial from Roberta Young about using Cavallo Simple Boots on a seven-hour muddy ride and in the Chesapeake Bay.
Customer testimonial from Sandra L. Switzer about her Arabian mare Darlin staying out overnight in a park, with Cavallo boots staying secure and protecting her feet.
Customer testimonial from Glenn Van Oort about three years of using Cavallo Simple Boots on two Morgan horses for picnic-drive training with minimal wear.
Customer testimonial from Debbie about using Cavallo Simple Boots on her Missouri Foxtrotter during a natural-trim transition, noting a night-and-day comfort difference on a rocky trail ride.
Customer testimonial from 10-year-old Samantha Iles-Highton about using Cavallo Simple Hoof Boots on the barefoot horse Jasmine for comfortable trail and gravel-road riding she can fit herself.
